title: Changing the order of status, so that when you are viewing "my work" by status, they appear in the order you want them
excerpt: When I use “my view”, I’d like to be able to then organize by status, but the problem is that the order the statuses then appears is not ideal. One of our statuses is “completed”, another is “on hold”… I don’t need those…

posts.author: CeeGee (Carreen)
posts.cookedHtml: When I use “my view”, I’d like to be able to then organize by status, but the problem is that the order the statuses then appears is not ideal. One of our statuses is “completed”, another is “on hold”… I don’t need those at the top, I want those at the bottom, and the more important ones at the top. I’ve tried rearranging the order that the statuses appear, both in my specific board, and in the template that I used to create my board, but nothing seems to change it. I did a live chat with a rep and he sent me a video of his screen showing this view, and the order his statuses appears is different than mine, so it seems like I should be rearrangeable, but he says it’s not.
